LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED IMMEDIATELY TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE CITED DEFECTS. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY MARCH 30, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Continued To Jun-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to strike is granted without leave to amend. Plaintiff is a suspended entity and cannot prosecute this action. (See Rev. & Tax. Code, sec. 23301, Corp. Code sec. 2204; Casiopea Bovet, LLC v. Chiang (2017) 12 Cal.App.5th 656, 662.) Plaintiff has not indicated that it will seek a certificate of revivor so a continuance is not warranted.

Order signed.

Judgee: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/SRB)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties failed to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 435.5. Plaintiff is ordered immediately to meet and confer regarding the cited defects. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by March 30, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
